name: Muhammad ibn Muslim
title: Warrior of Aqeel
shortDescription: The brother of Abdullah ibn Muslim and another brave son of Aqeel's family who was unjustly martyred alongside Imam Hussain (AS).
fullStory:
Muhammad ibn Muslim ibn Aqeel was Abdullah's brother and another brave son of Muslim ibn Aqeel. Like his brother, after hearing the news of his father's martyrdom in Kufa, he became even more resolute in defending Imam Hussain (AS).

On the day of Ashura, after his brother Abdullah went to the battlefield as the first of Bani Hashem and was martyred by an arrow to his forehead, Muhammad, along with other youths of Abu Talib's family, launched a collective attack on the enemy.

At that critical moment, Imam Hussain (AS) cried out: 'O my cousins! Be patient, for after this day, you will never see humiliation again.' In this group battle, Muhammad ibn Muslim fought with utmost bravery and dealt fatal blows to the enemy.

Finally, he was surrounded by Kufan forces and was martyred by someone named Abu Marham al-Azdi and Laqit ibn Iyas al-Juhani, joining his father and brother in Paradise.
quoteArabic: صَبْراً عَلى المَوْتِ بَنِي عُمُومَتِي، فَلا رَأَيْتُمْ هَواناً بَعْدَ هذَا اليَوْمِ
quote: (Imam's call to the family of Aqeel:) Be patient, my cousins, for after today you will never see humiliation.
